title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You've spent countless hours designing the perfect font, but when it's time to sell it online, you hit a roadblock. Banks in Nigeria often restrict transactions, and PayPal, the go-to payment processor, flat-out refuses to serve your country. You've tried Gumroad, but their fees are too steep, and you're not sure about their security. Meanwhile, your competitors are raking it in, while you're stuck on the sidelines, wondering what you're doing wrong. It's time to take control of your digital sales and explore alternative options that don't require PayPal or any other restrictive payment processors. In this article, we'll break down the differences between your choices and show you how to get paid without the hassle.
What Each Option Actually Offers

When it comes to selling fonts online, you have a few alternatives to PayPal. Gumroad, for example, offers a user-friendly interface and a 3.5% + 30¢ per sale fee. However, their security measures can be lacking, and their customer support is often unresponsive. Payhip, on the other hand, charges a 2.9% + 30¢ per sale fee, but their security is more robust. However, both options require you to create a buyer account, which can be a turn-off for some customers. As for Stripe, it's a popular option, but it's not available for many countries, including Nigeria. This is where NOWPayments comes in, a cryptocurrency payment processor that allows you to accept over 300 coins, including BTC, ETH, and USDT. With NOWPayments, you can sell your fonts without creating a buyer account or worrying about fees.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal is notorious for blocking accounts without warning. Gumroad and Payhip also have restrictions, but they're not as strict as PayPal's. However, NOWPayments operates on a more open-ended model, allowing you to accept payments from anywhere in the world. This means you can sell your fonts to customers in Nigeria and other restricted countries without worrying about your account being shut down. With NOWPayments, you can focus on creating more fonts and selling them to a global audience, without the hassle of dealing with restrictive payment processors.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, NOWPayments is the clear winner. With instant automated delivery, you can get your payments in real-time, without the need for manual processing. As for fees, NOWPayments charges a flat rate of 1% per sale, which is significantly lower than Gumroad's 3.5% + 30¢ per sale fee. Payhip's 2.9% + 30¢ per sale fee is also lower, but NOWPayments offers more flexible payment options, including cryptocurrency. In terms of real costs, NOWPayments is the most cost-effective option, allowing you to keep more of your sales revenue and focus on growing your business.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery, NOWPayments is the clear winner. With instant automated delivery, you can get your payments in real-time, without the need for manual processing. This means you can focus on creating more fonts and selling them to a global audience, without the hassle of dealing with restrictive payment processors. Additionally, NOWPayments offers a range of automation features, including email notifications and transaction logs, making it easier to manage your sales and customer interactions.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're looking for a user-friendly interface and a 3.5% + 30¢ per sale fee, Gumroad might be the way to go. However, if you're looking for more robust security and a lower fee, Payhip might be a better option. But if you want to sell your fonts to a global audience, without the hassle of dealing with restrictive payment processors, NOWPayments is the clear winner. With its instant automated delivery, 1% per sale fee, and flexible payment options, NOWPayments is the most cost-effective and efficient way to sell your fonts online.
